query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multi-turn reflective masking elicits reasoning in mask diffusion mode" linguistics
rationale: This paper is the foundational methods paper (category d) and the primary source of the specific mechanism ("Multi-Turn Reflective Masking") that the user's research question explicitly seeks to extend. It establishes the baseline technique and empirical results that any follow-up work in this specific niche must cite and build upon.
